tutorial.0: Place an iron mine on an iron deposit.
tutorial.1: Place a quarry on a tile.
tutorial.2: Connect the mine and the quarry to the port with roads.
tutorial.3: Upgrade the mine and the quarry to level 2.
tutorial.4: Place a coal mine and connect it to the port.
tutorial.5: Place an iron furnace and connect it to the port.
tutorial.6: Place a cement plant and connect it to the port.

bienvenue.title: Welcome to the archipelago
body: Your goal: extract resources, route them to the port via networks, process them into products, then deliver and research to unlock new buildings and new islands.
The banner at the top guides you step by step through your first builds.
Three networks connect everything: the road (solids), the pipe (liquids) and the cable (electricity).

recherche.title: Research
body: Open the Research panel (🔬). Each node requires resources delivered to the port to unlock buildings or islands.
Three ways to validate: automatic (as soon as the resources are gathered), manual (Confirm button) or delivery (ship a batch by boat).
A research ready to validate appears in yellow.

transport.title: Inter-island transport
body: A new island is available! Each island has its own port. Connect your buildings to the port by road, then configure the links in the Port panel.
Cargo ships carry batches between two islands at regular intervals. A liquid can only be shipped if a pipe connects its production to the port.

energie.title: Energy
body: Some buildings consume electricity. You must produce enough (wind turbine, power plant…) to cover demand.
Electricity is shared across the whole island: the balance (production − consumption) is shown at the top, with the 🔋 badge.
Open the Energy panel to see the breakdown and the unmet demand.

deficit.title: Energy deficit
body: Your production no longer covers consumption: some buildings will be cut off.
In the Energy panel, choose how electricity is rationed: by priority, by fair share, or proportionally.
Add producers, or store the surplus in an accumulator to absorb the peaks.

tuyaux.title: Liquids
body: You are producing a liquid (water, oil…). Liquids travel only through the pipe network, not by road.
To export a liquid to another island, the pipe must connect its production directly to the port.

reseau_sature.title: Saturated network
body: A network is carrying more than its throughput allows: the flow is throttled and the affected buildings run slowly.
Select the network and upgrade its level (V2, V3…) to increase throughput.
You can also set each building’s flow priority (high / normal / low) to serve the essentials first.

batiment_deconnecte.title: Disconnected building
body: A building is placed but is connected to no network: it produces nothing and receives nothing.
Connect it to the port with a road (and, depending on its needs, a pipe for liquids or a cable for electricity).

jonctions.title: Junctions
body: A junction lets two networks cross on the same tile without connecting (e.g. a road passing over a cable).
Only one kind of junction per island. Handy when space is tight.

upgrade_vs_v2.title: Upgrade or switch to V2?
body: Two different progressions coexist. Upgrading in place (Upgrade mode) raises the same building by a level: more production on the same tile.
A V2 version (e.g. Iron Furnace V2) is a new building, with its own recipe: you must build it in place of the old one.
Since ground space is limited, upgrading in place is often the best choice.

accumulateur.title: The accumulator
body: The accumulator stores surplus electricity when you produce more than needed, and releases it during a deficit.
Ideal for irregular producers or consumption peaks. It can be upgraded to increase its capacity.

nucleaire.title: The nuclear chain
body: A long chain opens up: uranium mine → crushing → yellow cake → enrichment → Nuclear Power Plant.
The plant must be connected to the cable to supply electricity, and fed continuously: its fuel is consumed constantly.
Its startup is gradual (several minutes) — plan the logistics ahead.

non_stockable.title: Non-storable resource
body: Cold water (produced by the cooler) cannot be stored: it is consumed in the very tick it is produced.
Production throughput must therefore be sufficient continuously; a surplus is simply lost, a shortage cuts off the building it feeds.

irradie.title: Irradiated materials & unlimited network
body: The Nuclear Power Plant can irradiate materials (reinforced concrete, steel, cable).
With 10,000 units of an irradiated material, a network switches to unlimited throughput: no more flow limit, never any saturation on that network again.

antenne.title: The T5 antenna
body: The antenna doubles the production of the 8 adjacent tiles (ramping up to a ×3 effect).
It consumes 512 kW continuously: place it at the center of a group of key buildings to maximize the bonus.

reparer.title: Repairing terrain
body: You can now repair obstacle tiles to make them buildable.
Each repair costs more than the last: ground space remains your most precious resource.

etendre.title: Extending terrain
body: Land reclamation turns a coastal water tile into buildable land.
Like repairs, the cost rises with each extension. Reserve it for truly strategic spots.

ui.Bilan énergie de l'île — cliquer pour gé: Island energy balance — click to manage the deficit
ui.Charge des accumulateurs de l'île — cliq: Island accumulator charge — click to manage energy
ui.Réparer le port pour débloquer l'île: Repair the port to unlock island
ui.Production / consommation / transit de t: Production / consumption / transit of all islands
ui.Livrez les ressources requises au port p: Deliver the required resources to the port to repair the link and unlock island
ui.×2 production sur les 8 cases adjacentes: ×2 production on the 8 adjacent tiles (cons. ×1→×3 oscillating)
ui.Servi en dernier : intrants ET électrici: Served last: inputs AND electricity after the others
ui.Servi en premier : intrants (route/tuyau: Served first: inputs (road/pipe) AND electricity first
ui.Livraison à calibrer — non activable: Delivery to calibrate — cannot be activated
ui.🔒 Réparez l'île voisine pour activer une: 🔒 Repair the neighboring island to activate a link before upgrading transit.
ui.Aucune liaison active. Débloquez l'île v: No active link. Unlock the neighboring island.
ui.Régler l'export par ressource vers l'île: Set export per resource to island
ui.Priorité : la cale est remplie de la res: Priority: the hold is filled from the highest-priority resource to the lowest.
ui.Proportionnel : la cale est répartie au: Proportional: the hold is shared pro rata to each resource's demand (the order only breaks ties for the remainder).
ui.Réserve locale (on n'exporte que le surp: Local reserve (only the surplus above is exported)
ui.Cible = quantité voulue ici (import). Ré: Target = quantity wanted here (import). Reserve = stock kept locally (only the surplus is exported). Priority = loading order on departure.
ui.Chaque consommateur reçoit la même quant: Each consumer gets the same absolute amount (kW); the surplus unused by a small building benefits the others. A building that does not reach its rated power is cut off this tick.
ui.Coupe les plus gros consommateurs d'abor: Cuts the biggest consumers first so the rest run at full speed (the engine works all-or-nothing, no partial rate).
ui.⚡ L'électricité circule par réseau de câ: ⚡ Electricity flows through cable networks: each cable network is a distinct electrical sub-network (the generators, consumers and accumulators it connects share the energy). The cable throughput (V1, V2…) caps the transmittable power: upgrade it if a network saturates. The totals below sum all the island's networks.
ui.Aucun consommateur d'énergie sur cette î: No energy consumer on this island.
ui.Prévenir quand le stock de cette île pas: Warn when this island's stock drops below this threshold (0 = disabled)
ui.Plage de consommation : les bâtiments à: Consumption range: buildings with sigmoid/random consumption make power demand vary. Size production for the max.
ui.Demande supérieure au débit max : tous l: Demand exceeds max throughput: all the network's buildings are slowed to this percentage
ui.Énergie stockée dans les accumulateurs b: Energy stored in the accumulators connected to this cable network (charge / capacity).
ui.⚡ Production suffisante mais câble satur: ⚡ Production sufficient but cable saturated: upgrade the throughput to transmit everything.
ui.⚡ Production insuffisante sur ce réseau: ⚡ Insufficient production on this cable network.
ui.Stock liquide accumulé dans la citerne d: Liquid stock accumulated in the pipe network's tank (oil, water, acid…). Does not appear in the port inventory.
ui.Sélectionne et copie ce texte, garde-le: Select and copy this text, keep it somewhere safe.
ui.✓ Copié dans le presse-papier. Conserve-: ✓ Copied to the clipboard. Keep it to re-import it.
ui.Cet emplacement est vide (aucune sauvega: This slot is empty (no save to export).
ui.Charge un fichier .txt exporté (ou colle: Load an exported .txt file (or paste the text): a new game will be created.
ui.Le mode fixe la taille des îles pour cet: The mode sets the island size for this game.
ui.Grandes îles, plus d'espace pour constru: Large islands, more space to build.
✓ The game is up to date.
ui.Afficher une explication à chaque nouvel: Show an explanation for each new mechanic
ui.Au-delà d'1 h d'absence, approxime la pr: Beyond 1 h of absence, approximates production (near-instant catch-up)
ui.En mode Améliorer, toucher un bâtiment l: In Upgrade mode, tapping a building upgrades it directly (no confirmation)
ui.Petit numéro de niveau en bas à gauche d: Small level number at the bottom-left of buildings
ui.Petite icône en haut à droite des bâtime: Small icon at the top-right of buildings in deficit / breakdown
ui.Pourcentage d'efficacité à gauche du niv: Efficiency percentage to the left of the level, in case of deficit
ui.Passer le tutoriel et tout débloquer: Skip the tutorial and unlock everything
ui.Ce texte n'est pas une sauvegarde Archip: This text is not a valid Archipel save.
ui.❌ Jonction : pose sur une tuile vide ou: ❌ Junction: place on an empty tile or a crossing network
ui.❌ Une seule jonction de ce type par île: ❌ Only one junction of this type per island
ui.❌ Pas de place pour le réseau croisé à c: ❌ No room for the crossing network alongside
ui.❌ Doit être en mer, adjacent à la côte: ❌ Must be at sea, adjacent to the coast
ui.📋 Mode copie : touchez un bâtiment à cop: 📋 Copy mode: tap a building to copy
ui.Île verrouillée — débloquez-la via la Re: Island locked — unlock it via Research
ui.🔒 Aucune liaison active — réparez d'abor: 🔒 No active link — repair the neighboring island first
ui.Sélectionnez un outil en bas pour constr: Select a tool at the bottom to build
ui.Menu construction — choisissez un bâtime: Build menu — choose a building, or "Quit" to close
ui.Menu réseau — choisissez une infrastruct: Network menu — choose an infrastructure, or "Quit" to close
ui.Mode sélection — glissez pour naviguer,: Selection mode — drag to navigate, tap a building for its info
ui.— touchez un bâtiment (remb. 100%, un p: — tap a building (refund 100%, one per tap) · drag to navigate
ui.— touchez un bâtiment pour le sélection: — tap a building to select it
ui.— touchez entre les deux réseaux (mêmes: — tap between the two networks (same levels)
ui.Astuces désactivées — réactivables dans: Tips disabled — can be re-enabled in the options
